title: Gently Grilled Portuguese Steak Grill
description: A macrobiotic friendly solo dinner dish featuring fillet of steak, with a citrusy and velvety flavor profile, grilled to perfection on a binchotan grill.
instructions: Preheat the binchotan grill to medium high heat.
In a small bowl, whisk together lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Place the fillet of steak in a shallow dish and brush the lemon juice mixture evenly over both sides of the steak.
Let the steak marinate for 10 minutes, then place it on the preheated grill.
Grill the steak for 5 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 130 degrees Fahrenheit.
While the steak is cooking, heat the dum in a small saucepan over low heat.
Once the steak is cooked, let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing it thinly against the grain.
Serve the sliced steak with the heated dum and garnish with chopped fresh parsley.
